name: Swansea University Athletics Track
metaTitle: Swansea University Athletics Track | Info & Wind Speed
metaDescription: Check live wind speed and track information for the Swansea University Athletics Track at Sketty Lane.

trackInfo.heading: Opening Times
trackInfo.text: The track is open for university use, club training, and public sessions. Please check the Swansea Bay Sports Park website for today's specific timetable.

trackInfo.heading: Entry Price
trackInfo.text: Access is available via membership or pay-as-you-go sessions. Contact the sports park for current track use rates.

trackInfo.heading: Track Details
trackInfo.text: An international standard 8-lane 400m track, home to the Swansea Harriers Athletics Club and high-performance training.

trackInfo.heading: Parking Details
trackInfo.text: On-site parking is managed via ANPR. Pay-to-park charges apply during restricted hours (typically weekdays 08:00–16:00).

trackInfo.heading: Address
trackInfo.text: Swansea Bay Sports Park, Sketty Lane, Sketty, Swansea, SA2 8QG

trackInfo.heading: Website
trackInfo.text: Check facility updates and book sessions via the official Swansea Bay Sports Park website.
